label: Process
description: An experimental process consisting of one or more ordered steps

label: ProcessStep
description: A single step within a Process; may consume Input and modify InputSettings

label: Input
description: A material or data input consumed by a ProcessStep

label: InputSettings
description: Configuration parameters associated with an Input

label: Setup
description: Physical or instrumental setup described by a ProcessStep

label: realizedOccurent
description: Upper-level class for occurrents that are realized in time

label: Specimen
description: A physical specimen used as input material

label: Experiment
description: Target pattern: an experiment as a structured investigation

label: ExperimentSetup
description: Target pattern: the configuration and setup for an Experiment

label: Sample
description: Target pattern: the sample used in an Experiment

label: Parameters
description: Target pattern: the measured or controlled parameters of a Sample
